title: Glocal Eyes: Globale und lokale Dimensionen visueller Kommunikation
organisation: Institute for German as a Foreign Language
further_info: Recommended Reading Rimmele, Marius / Sachs-Hombach, Klaus & Stiegler, Bernd (Hg.) (2014), Bildwissenschaft und Visual Culture, Transcript Verlag, Bielefeld. Appadurai, Arjun (1996): Modernity at Large: Cultural Dimensions of Globalization. Public Worlds, Volume 1, University of Minnesota press, Minneapolis - London. Kress, Gunther & van Leeuwen, Theo (2006): Reading Images. The Grammar of Visual Design. Routledge, London - New York. Mirzoeff, Nicholas (1998): The Visual Culture Reader. Routledge, London - New York. Robertson, Roland (1995): Glocalization: Time, Space and Homogeneity-Heterogeneity. In: Featherstone, M., Lash, S. and Robertson, R., Eds., Global Modernities. Sage Publications, London, 25-44.
